title: Backups & Recovery
subtitle: Manage full snapshots of the PostgreSQL database.
retention_auto_desc: Run daily at 02:00 UTC by the main cluster. Kept for 30 days.
retention_manual_desc: Kept indefinitely until manually deleted. Limited to 5 per project on your plan.
retention_encryption: Archives are encrypted at rest (AES-256). Archive password required outside the platform.
restore_modal_subtitle: You are about to overwrite the production database.
restore_modal_warning: WARNING: This will revoke access for all current users, disconnect all Tenants, and restore the entire dataset to the snapshot state:
